executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned verification is healthy, but the marketing owner loop remains red on independent verification while outcome evidence is still measurement-pending.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Let the active marketing measurement window produce a fresh evidence point, then rerun the marketing bundle and independent verification instead of recertifying stale flat-adoption evidence.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus current owner-loop artifacts

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Marketing is the remaining live red owner loop
findings.mechanism: marketing independent verifier is fail and the workflow audit still marks the repair window as measurement_pending.
findings.root_cause: The current tactics have not yet produced Codeberg adoption movement, and the active hold window means a fresh outcome-bearing evidence point is still pending.
findings.recommended_fix: Wait for the active measurement window to mature, then rerun the marketing bundle and independent verifier on fresh evidence.

findings.title: Docs owner loop is green again
findings.mechanism: docs independent verifier is pass and latest verifier markdown shows independently verified pass.
findings.root_cause: The docs supervisor cleared the incident and current verifier artifacts are healthy.
findings.recommended_fix: No architecture-side repair needed; keep treating docs as independently owned and green unless a newer docs artifact regresses.

findings.title: Architecture audit metadata is refreshed against the current live cron topology
findings.mechanism: live runtime currently reports 21 enabled jobs with zero live-disabled entries and zero last-error residue.
findings.root_cause: Architecture health depends on live cron truth instead of persisted-history conflation.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep refreshing architecture artifacts from live cron state before verifier signoff.

findings.title: One-shot measurement-release routing remains explicitly targeted
findings.mechanism: The temporary marketing-measurement-hold-release job now resolves to an explicit Matrix room target instead of an unresolvable implicit route.
findings.root_cause: One-shot delivery needs explicit routing to avoid fail-closed execution.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep one-shot follow-up jobs on explicit delivery targets or delivery.mode=none so they cannot fail closed at execution time.

findings.title: Live scheduler is otherwise clean
findings.mechanism: 21 live jobs, 21 enabled, 0 disabled, no last-error residue.
findings.root_cause: Current cron state is stable at inspection time.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture artifacts aligned with live scheduler topology and delivery reality
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: This run refreshed topology evidence and revalidated explicit one-shot delivery routing.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Prevents false signoff drift and keeps topology evidence truthful.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Let the active marketing measurement window mature, then rerun marketing independent verification on fresh evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing is still the only remaining owned red domain in the live state.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the last owner-loop blocker or produces new evidence for a real tactic change.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun architecture signoff after the next fresh marketing evidence point lands
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Architecture is already localized; the next meaningful state change is marketing outcome evidence.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Produces an architecture pass/qualified_pass tied to the next real blocker transition instead of churn.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed the architecture audit summary from current live cron state plus latest owner-loop artifacts.
Rechecked live job counts, zero last-error residue, and explicit Matrix delivery target for the one-shot release job.
Reran architecture independent verification and verifier markdown after the audit refresh.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass after the active measurement window yields new outcome evidence.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: The architecture path can localize this blocker, but it cannot certify marketing healthy until the primary-repo measurement window produces a real delta or new failure evidence.

notes: Architecture green here means architecture-owned verification is healthy and correctly localizing blockers; it does not mean the full system is globally green.
Persisted disabled jobs are history only; live disabled jobs are zero.
Docs is green; marketing remains the only live owner-loop red domain.
Independent signoff was rerun after the live topology check in this watchdog pass.
The one-shot marketing measurement release job still holds an explicit Matrix room delivery target.
